title: calea heteropappa
intro: Calea heteropappa, also known as Mexican Damiana or Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calea heteropappa include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. Calea heteropappa can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
